summary: Admin Rewards & Referral Management, 5 new banking fee types, dynamic reward configuration
highlights: Admin Rewards Management — full referral tracking, reward history, manual credit, and void capabilities
Dynamic reward settings — referral bonus, cashback rate, and minimum transfer configurable via system_config
Edge function rewards-process-cashback reads config dynamically instead of hardcoded values
Customer app reward display syncs with admin-configured values in real time
5 new fee types: overdraft_fee, loan_processing_fee, atm_withdrawal, standing_order, dormancy_fee
New 'Banking' fee category for ATM, standing order, and dormancy fees
Fee estimate hook updated with new channel mappings and fallback rates

summary: Overdraft Eligibility Engine, Credit Report Purchase, and Fee Management enhancements
highlights: Overdraft Eligibility Engine — 7-factor scoring (salary, savings, balance, tenure, activity, repayment, credit score) with explainable risk bands (A-F)
Full overdraft lifecycle: recalculate, request, approve, suspend, revoke, reinstate with email notifications and audit logging
Auto-approval for high-score profiles (≥75), approval workflow integration for manual review
FI Portal Overdraft Management dashboard with summary stats, profile table, and action dialogs
Banking App overdraft eligibility check integrated into Bank Credit Score page
Credit Report Purchase — wallet-based payment with balance validation and 30-day access
Fee Management — Services category added for Credit Report Purchase fee structures
OpenAPI spec updated with 7 Overdraft endpoints under /accounts/{accountId}/overdraft/*
New tables: account_overdraft_profiles, overdraft_score_factors

summary: POS Consumer Marketplace, QR Payments, Wallet payment method
highlights: POS Consumer Marketplace — merchants publish storefronts via subscription; consumers browse, cart, and buy with wallet balance
QR Code Payments — merchant QR generation (static/dynamic) and consumer scan-to-pay
Wallet payment method added to pos-pay-order — atomic consumer debit + merchant credit
New edge functions: pos-store-browse, pos-consumer-cart, pos-consumer-checkout, pos-qr-payment, pos-store-subscription
New tables: pos_store_profiles, pos_subscription_plans, pos_store_subscriptions, pos_consumer_carts, pos_consumer_cart_items

summary: Merchant Staff Login portal with Email+Password and Phone+PIN authentication
highlights: Dedicated Merchant Staff Login portal at /staff-login
merchant-create-staff and staff-pin-login edge functions
PIN-based staff authentication with salted SHA-256 hashing

summary: Cameroon Banking Identifiers — RIB, IBAN, BIC/SWIFT validation and bank directory
highlights: Full RIB (23-digit) and IBAN (27-char) validation with MOD-97 checksum
validate-rib, validate-account-identifier, directory-banks-cm edge functions
DOMESTIC_RIB added to account_scheme enum
Transfer rail auto-selection (internal, domestic_interbank, international)

summary: Funding Intents API with full lifecycle tracking and multi-provider support
highlights: Funding Intents API — canonical domain for account funding (created → pending → succeeded/failed/cancelled/expired)
PayPal inbound funding with auto-capture on approval
Bank transfer funding instructions with unique reference generation
Funding reconciliation job with 24h expiry
Idempotency-Key enforcement per (account_id, key)

summary: Multi-Tenancy Apps Showcase and PWA ecosystem presentation
highlights: Apps Showcase page at /apps — Banking, Merchant, Customer app demos
Multi-tenancy branding demo with institutional theming
Technical Architecture section with TenantProvider context flow

summary: Cameroon Regulatory Filing Pack — 10 BEAC/COBAC submission documents

Corporate Structure, Internal Control, AML/CFT, Data Protection policies
Risk Assessment Matrix and Regulatory Reporting Templates

summary: Shared UI components and merchant/FI portal dashboard enhancements

Merchant Dashboard, Analytics, Payouts, Settlements, Transactions, Refunds redesigned
FI Portal Analytics and Transactions enhanced with new components

summary: 30+ institutional pages, regulatory compliance, fraud engine, and multi-country expansion

Fraud Engine — 5-layer defence model
Double-Entry Ledger and Reconciliation Framework documentation

summary: OpenAPI spec accuracy fixes — grant types, idempotency, consent headers, webhook event types
highlights: grant_type enum includes client_credentials
Idempotency-Key header marked required
x-consent-id header added to all AISP endpoints
24 webhook event types enumerated
Legacy endpoints marked deprecated in favor of Gateway API

summary: Critical payment gateway fixes — Stripe currency guard, webhook verification, wallet credits
highlights: Stripe zero-decimal currency guard for USD/EUR vs XAF/XOF
Stripe webhook signature verification enforced
Merchant wallet credited on successful charge
Over-refund guard and dispute wallet adjustments

In-memory ZIP generation edge function
6 WooCommerce endpoints with full schemas

Merchant Onboarding API fully documented (13 endpoints)
9 new schemas for payment links, subscriptions, subaccounts, customers

summary: PayPal Payouts API and PayPal withdrawal support

PayPal withdrawal with automatic failure reversal

summary: Internal Account Transfer and Facilitated Bank Transfer endpoints
